business.headline: Sensex opens 100 points higher, Nifty above 23,400; Asian Paints up 4%The S&P BSE Sensex was down 216.67 points to 74,342.57, while the NSE Nifty50 lost 68.50 points to 23,311.05 as of 9:47 am.

Gold jumps Rs 9,206, silver surges Rs 16,743 after import duty hikeGold futures on MCX jumped Rs 9,206, or 6%, to Rs 1,62,648 per 10 grams in early trade. Silver futures also rallied strongly, rising Rs 16,743, or 6%, to Rs 2,95,805 per kg as of 9 am.

Air India cuts flights to major global destinations as fuel costs surgeAir India has suspended and reduced several international services from June as fuel prices rise and airspace restrictions bite. The cuts underline growing pressure on long-haul operations, with the airline warning that more routes could turn unviable.

From Thailand to Dubai: How your next foreign trip could weaken the rupeeWhat does a Europe honeymoon, Thailand getaway or Dubai shopping spree have in common? Beyond memories and Instagram pictures, they all mean more dollars leaving India. Let's understand here.

Gold, silver imports to get costlier as govt hikes customs duty after PM's appealDays after Prime Minister Narendra Modi urged people to avoid buying gold for a year amid economic strain caused by the Iran war and pressure on foreign exchange reserves, the government raised import duties on gold and silver from 6 per cent to 15 per cent.

Rising oil prices will impact inflation and interest rates: Nilesh ShahIn an exclusive interview with India Today, Nilesh Shah, Managing Director at Kotak Mahindra Asset Management Company and a member of the Prime Minister's Economic Advisory Council, addressed the recent market downturn and the Prime Minister's call for austerity.

Dubai court acquits man in Dh1.6 million dispute, says failed deal isn't fraudDubai's criminal court acquitted a man accused in an investment-related dispute. The ruling said the case pointed to a civil business fallout, not proven criminal fraud.

Paytm UPI growing twice as fast as UPI industry, here's what's fuelling its comebackIn its Q4 FY26 earnings release filed last week, the company reported that consumer UPI gross transaction value (GTV) grew 46% year-on-year to Rs 5.5 lakh crore in the March quarter, more than double (2.2x) the industry's 21% growth rate.

India has 60 days of crude, no shortage anywhere, says Hardeep Singh PuriSpeaking at the CII Annual Business Summit 2026, Hardeep Singh Puri, said India's energy supplies remain secure despite geopolitical uncertainty and military tensions involving major oil-producing regions.

Retail inflation inches up to 3.48% in April, driven by rising food pricesData released by the government on Tuesday showed retail inflation, measured by the Consumer Price Index (CPI), rose to 3.48% in April from 3.40% in March. The reading, however, came in lower than Reuters economists' expectations of 3.8%.

Uday Kotak warns consumers to 'prepare for the worst' amid US-Iran conflictSpeaking at the CII Annual Business Summit 2026, Kotak warned that rising energy prices linked to tensions in West Asia could soon begin hurting consumers and businesses, especially those already struggling with limited incomes.

Sensex ends 1,456 points lower, Nifty below 23,400; TCS, Infosys fall over 3%The BSE Sensex crashed 1,456.32 points or 1.92% to close at 74,558.96, while the NSE Nifty50 slumped 454.15 points or 1.91% to settle at 23,361.70.

Tourism body backs PM Modi's travel appeal, seeks more foreign touristsThe industry body said tourism can become a strong source of foreign exchange if the right steps are taken. It suggested easier visa rules, better flight connectivity and stronger global marketing to make India more attractive to international travellers.

Why Indians poured Rs 3 lakh crore into mutual funds despite market jittersIndia's mutual fund industry recorded total net inflows of Rs 3.22 lakh crore in April 2026, while overall Assets Under Management (AUM) climbed to a record Rs 81.92 lakh crore, according to the latest monthly data released by the Association of Mutual Funds in India (AMFI)..

Gold prices remain steady: Should you sell now or wait?With gold prices showing little movement in recent days, many investors are left wondering what to do next. Is this a pause before another rise, or a good moment to lock in profits and sell?

India declines US-sanctioned Russian LNG despite supply strainIndia has told Russia it will not buy liquefied natural gas cargoes covered by US sanctions. The decision has left a tanker waiting near Singapore and underlined the compliance risks around Russian LNG.

AI can improve portfolios, but good investing still needs context: Geojit's Jones GeorgeAs India's retail investing boom accelerates, AI-driven tools are reshaping how investors access markets and build portfolios. But technology alone cannot replace discipline, judgment and long-term financial understanding, says Jones George, Executive Director at Geojit Financial Services.

Groww shares tumble sharply after block deal: Should investors worry?Groww shares slid sharply after a block deal by early investors followed the lock-in expiry. Analysts said the fall reflected supply pressure and weak markets rather than any fresh business setback.

Sensex crashes over 1,500 points: Why is the stock market falling today?As of 3:13 pm, the Sensex was trading at 74,486.50, down 1,528.78 points or 2.01%, while the Nifty50 declined 458.85 points or 1.93% to 23,357.00.

Infosys, TCS shares tumble up to 4%: Why are IT shares falling today?Indian IT stocks slid sharply on Tuesday as global growth worries and broader market weakness intensified. The selloff underscored concerns over client spending, West Asia tensions and near-term volatility.

entertainment.headline: Kannada actor-producer Dileep Raj dies at 47 after suffering heart attack Kannada actor and producer Dileep Raj died at the age of 47 after suffering a massive heart attack. Known for films like Milana and serials such as Hitler Kalyana, he was also a theatre artist, producer and dubbing actor.

A losing battle: Demi Moore on Hollywood's fight against artificial intelligence At the Cannes Film Festival 2026, actor Demi Moore said fighting artificial intelligence is a losing battle for Hollywood. She urged the industry to find ways to work with the technology.

Relapsed 6th time: The Family Man actor Sharib Hashmi reveals wife's cancer battle Sharib Hashmi and wife Nasreen spoke about her prolonged oral cancer battle in a recent interview. Their account centred on repeated relapses, ongoing treatment and the support they draw from each other.

Can Karuppu bring back Suriya in vintage form as a mass superstar? Tamil star Suriya has been experimenting across genres over the last decade. His new film Karuppu seems to be a calculated fan-service bet for the actor, to reclaim box office glory.

The Odyssey: Christopher Nolan explains Travis Scott's casting as a bard Filmmaker Christopher Nolan defended the casting of rapper Travis Scott in The Odyssey after facing criticism on social media. He also addressed backlash over the armour design seen in the film's footage shared early this year.

Paul Bettany returns as Vision in Marvel's VisionQuest, show's release date out Marvel has confirmed the release date of VisionQuest, the final chapter in the WandaVision trilogy, with Paul Bettany returning as Vision in the upcoming Disney+ series. Read to know more details.

Why Vijay-Trisha remain Tamil Cinema's most loved on-screen couple in recent years Vijay and Trisha's on-screen journey is back in focus from Ghilli to GOAT. Their six-film arc, fifteen-year gap and reunion underline an enduring Tamil cinema pairing.

Alia Bhatt questions Indian cinema's male focus, bats for gender-agnostic films At Cannes, actor Alia Bhatt questioned Indian cinema's continued focus on male audiences despite women-led global hits. She said films should be gender-agnostic and driven by storytelling rather than a star's gender.

Did Suraj Nambiar cheat Mouni Roy? Reports claim misappropriation of money Actor Mouni Roy and her husband, businessman Suraj Nambiar, are at the centre of fresh separation rumours after a report alleged financial misuse by him. Neither Mouni nor Suraj has responded to the speculation so far.

Riteish Deshmukh on Raja Shivaji: This isn't just another commercial film Actor Riteish Deshmukh spoke about the responsibility of bringing a Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj story to the big screen. He said the film's response revealed a deeply personal bond across generations.

Alia Bhatt shares candid moment with Formula 1 racer Carlos Sainz at Cannes. Watch Alia Bhatt met F1 racer Carlos Sainz at the Cannes Film Festival. A video of the two from the prestigious film festival has emerged online.

Suriya's Karuppu team thanks Vijay for permission to screen 9 am shows Ahead of Karuppu's May 14 release, the makers said its first-day-first-show would start at 9 am and thanked Chief Minister Vijay for the permission.

Nani's The Paradise makers deny reshoots, confirm August 21 release is on track The makers of Nani's The Paradise have denied rumours of reshoots and fresh delay. They said the film has completed over 100 shooting days and is set for an August 21 release.
Sharon Stone supports Sofía Vergara's take on dating rich men Sharon Stone reacted after an old interview of Sofía Vergara discussing dating standards resurfaced online.

Indian Idol fame Mohd Danish's Aigiri Nandini performance goes viral. Video Singer Mohd Danish of Indian Idol 12 fame has gone viral for singing Aigiri Nandini, a hymn dedicated to Goddess Durga. Viewers praised the emotional performance, saying it was a reminder that music goes beyond religion.

Who is Suraj Nambiar? Everything to know about Mouni Roy's husband Rumours about trouble in actor Mouni Roy and Suraj Nambiar's marriage gathered pace after they unfollowed each other on social media. With neither issuing a statement yet, online attention has shifted to who Suraj Nambiar is.

Mouni Roy archives wedding pics, husband Suraj deletes Insta account amid rift buzz Amid separation rumours, actor Mouni Roy has reportedly archived or removed several pictures with husband Suraj Nambiar, including their wedding photos. Suraj's Instagram account appears to have been deleted, too.

Kamal Haasan praises CM Vijay's move to shut liquor shops near temples and schools Kamal Haasan praised Tamil Nadu CM Vijay's first major decision after taking office, and the move is already drawing political attention across the state.

Vimal Khanna trailer out: Sunny Hinduja leads gritty survival thriller The trailer of Vimal Khanna is out, introducing Sunny Hinduja in a gritty survival thriller adapted from Surender Mohan Pathak's popular literary universe.

general news.headline: Live: Tamil Nadu trust vote on, TVK allies announce support, eyes now on AIADMK, DMKTamil Nadu CM Floor Test Live Updates: The crucial Tamil Nadu floor test is underway with the Congress and AIADMK faction led by CV Shanmugam deciding to back the TVK. With the TVK-led government having 121 MLAs, including five from Congress, two each from CPI, CPI (M), VCK and the IUML and one from the AMMK. The majority mark is 117 based on the current Assembly strength of 232. The AIADMK faction, which emerged after reports of a possible alliance with DMK, has 30 MLAs while the remaining 17 legislators are with AIADMK chief Edappadi K Palaniswami. Ahead of the trust vote, CM Vijay met with Tamil Nadu Congress leaders and other leaders from his allies. The DMK is likely to skip voting and walkout from the House, which means the majority mark will come down to 88, making it smooth sailing for the TVK. Stay tuned to indiatoday.in for all the latest updates.

Prateek Yadav, Mulayam Singh's younger son and Akhilesh's half-brother, dies at 38Prateek Yadav was the son of the late Samajwadi Party founder Mulayam Singh Yadav and his second wife Sadhana Gupta. He had been unwell for some time. A few weeks ago, he was admitted to a hospital in Lucknow, where Akhilesh Yadav had also visited him.

NEET leak: Rs 30 lakh deal with Gurugram doc in focus, Rajasthan brothers arrestedInvestigators say two brothers from Rajasthan bought the NEET-UG paper from a Gurugram doctor before the exam. The case now points to how the paper was allegedly circulated further among aspirants.

WFH, no foreign travel: Here's how much you can help India savePM Narendra Modi urged Indians to revive Covid-era habits like work from home (WFH), avoiding non-essential foreign travel and reducing fuel consumption to help India save foreign exchange amid the Iran war. How much forex can Indians help save with judicious fuel consumption? The answer is in the Covid years.

NEET paper leak chaos not just an academic crisis, but an emotional one tooAfter reports of a paper leak, the NTA cancelled NEET-UG 2026 and ordered a fresh exam. The decision has pushed lakhs of students and their families back into anxiety, waiting and emotional strain.

Updates: He was a very good person devoted to his work, says Akhilesh YadavPrateek Yadav Death News Updates: Prateek Yadav, the son of late Samajwadi Party founder Mulayam Singh Yadav and half-brother of SP chief Akhilesh Yadav, died in Lucknow on Wednesday at the age of 38. Prateek, who was also the husband of BJP leader Aparna Yadav, was brought to Civil Hospital around 6 am, where doctors declared him dead. His body was later shifted to the KGMU postmortem house, where a panel of forensic experts is conducting the autopsy under tight security and videography surveillance. Akhilesh Yadav reached the mortuary during the proceedings and went directly to meet doctors. The Samajwadi Party condoled Prateek's death, calling it "extremely saddening" in a post on X. Stay tuned to indiatoday.in for all the latest updates.

PM orders 50% cut in convoy size, bats for more EV use in austerity push: SourcesPrime Minister Narendra Modi has ordered a 50% cut in his convoy size and increased use of EVs as part of an austerity and fuel-saving drive amid the economic fallout of the Iran war, sources told India Today TV.

Gangs of Wasseypur 3 running successfullyGangs of Wasseypur 3, not an Anurag Kashyap directorial, is running successfully in Jharkhand's Dhanbad. Prince Khan, a local gangster who is now said to be in Pakistan, is extorting businessmen and threatening even the SSP of Dhanbad. There's free-flowing abuse, guns and violence. The extent of terror is such that BJP leader Babulal Marandi has sought an NIA probe.

Vijay separates temple from tavern; dares to go where no TN CM has gone beforeWelfare and whisky are strange bedfellows in Tamil Nadu. The State doles out freebies with one hand and pours poison with the other. So, Vijay has done something bold by shutting liquor vends close to temples, schools and bus stands.

Gold, silver imports to get costlier as govt hikes customs duty after PM's appealDays after Prime Minister Narendra Modi urged people to avoid buying gold for a year amid economic strain caused by the Iran war and pressure on foreign exchange reserves, the government raised import duties on gold and silver from 6 per cent to 15 per cent.

How 'leaked papers' reach mobile phones: 3 NEET students recount the hidden systemOne exam, millions of anxious students. And somewhere between encrypted Telegram groups and late-night WhatsApp forwards, NEET's shadow economy was already awake.

Kannada actor-producer Dileep Raj dies at 47 after suffering heart attackKannada actor and producer Dileep Raj died at the age of 47 after suffering a massive heart attack. Known for films like Milana and serials such as Hitler Kalyana, he was also a theatre artist, producer and dubbing actor.

Did Suraj Nambiar cheat Mouni Roy? Reports claim misappropriation of moneyActor Mouni Roy and her husband, businessman Suraj Nambiar, are at the centre of fresh separation rumours after a report alleged financial misuse by him. Neither Mouni nor Suraj has responded to the speculation so far.

Sam Altman says Elon Musk wanted his children to inherit OpenAISam Altman told the court that Elon Musk once sought lasting control over OpenAI and suggested it could pass to his children. The testimony goes to the heart of the dispute over OpenAI's mission, governance and later commercial shift.

Rahul Gandhi submits dissent note on CBI chief selection, claims mockery of processA high-level meeting was held at the Prime Minister's residence and attended by PM Modi, Chief Justice of India Surya Kant and Gandhi to discuss potential successors to outgoing CBI Director Praveen Sood, whose tenure ends on May 24.

Air India cuts flights to major global destinations as fuel costs surgeAir India has suspended and reduced several international services from June as fuel prices rise and airspace restrictions bite. The cuts underline growing pressure on long-haul operations, with the airline warning that more routes could turn unviable.

Why Vijay-Trisha remain Tamil Cinema's most loved on-screen couple in recent yearsVijay and Trisha's on-screen journey is back in focus from Ghilli to GOAT. Their six-film arc, fifteen-year gap and reunion underline an enduring Tamil cinema pairing.

Maduro capture-inspired fashion? Marco Rubio spotted in similar Nike tracksuitMarco Rubio drew attention online after appearing aboard Air Force One in a Nike Tech tracksuit that users linked to the outfit worn by ousted Venezuelan leader Nicolas Maduro during his capture and transfer to the US earlier this year.

California mayor resigns after pleading guilty to acting as Chinese agentProsecutors alleged that Wang and her former fiance worked under the direction of Chinese officials to spread pro-Beijing propaganda in the US. Wang now faces a possible 10-year prison sentence, while her ex-fiance is already serving a four-year jail term.

NEET-UG cancelled: Super 30's Anand Kumar wants China-like crackdown after leakAnand Kumar called for strict action against coaching centres after NEET-UG 2026 was cancelled over alleged irregularities. The decision has triggered a re-test and a CBI probe into the examination process.

Ticket checker offers Vande Bharat ticket worth Rs 700 for Rs 380, Railways reactsA video showed a TTE allegedly offering a Vande Bharat ticket for Rs 380 during an onboard exchange with a passenger. The clip prompted a suspension and renewed debate over transparency, informal ticketing and accountability in the railways.

Was offered money to target Virat Kohli: German influencer makes explosive claimIPL 2026: Virat Kohli's viral Instagram controversy has taken another twist after German influencer LizLaz claimed she was allegedly offered money to publicly target the RCB star. The influencer said she refused to make false allegations against Kohli despite being approached.

Udhayanidhi Stalin repeats controversial comments on Sanatan, CM Vijay watchesUdhayanidhi Stalin repeated his call for the eradication of Sanatan Dharma in the Tamil Nadu Assembly. The remark drew fresh BJP attacks, while Assembly immunity limits the immediate legal risk.

From Thailand to Dubai: How your next foreign trip could weaken the rupeeWhat does a Europe honeymoon, Thailand getaway or Dubai shopping spree have in common? Beyond memories and Instagram pictures, they all mean more dollars leaving India. Let's understand here.

sports.headline: Is Hardik Pandya really injured? MI captain dazzles in late night net session Hardik Pandya posted videos of a late-night net session after missing two Mumbai Indians matches with back spasms. The MI captain showed no signs of injury and seems to have stepped his recovery from back spasms.

Preity Zinta, PBKS slam fake stories on team as social media scrutiny grows Preity Zinta and Punjab Kings have publicly denounced the false stories circulating about the team and its players, as social media scrutiny of the franchise continues to intensify. PBKS have suffered a sharp drop in form after their latest losses in IPL 2026.

IPL Play of the Day: Rabada, Siraj unleash powerplay hell to stun Hyderabad IPL 2026, GT vs SRH: Kagiso Rabada and Mohammed Siraj rattled the Sunrisers Hyderabad on Tuesday, May 12 and helped Gujarat Titans win by 82 runs at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad.

Jason Collins, former NBA player, dies at 47 after cancer battle Former NBA player Jason Collins has died at 47 after battling glioblastoma, his family said. Collins was a trailblazer who made history in 2013 by coming out as gay while still an active player.

Ronaldo's title wait continues after Al Nassr's last-minute draw vs Al Hilal Al Nassr conceded a stoppage-time equaliser to draw 1-1 with Al Hilal in a crucial title-race derby. The result left Cristiano Ronaldo stunned and kept the Saudi Pro League race alive.

Pat Cummins backs SRH top-order despite 86 all-out vs GT IPL 2026: Pat Cummins backed Sunrisers Hyderabad's batters after their 82-run loss to Gujarat Titans in Ahmedabad. He said such collapses can happen in T20 cricket and praised Gujarat's near-perfect bowling.

Gujarat Titans strengthen playoff push after SRH batting meltdown IPL 2026: Gujarat Titans climbed to the top of the IPL table with a dominant 82-run win over Sunrisers Hyderabad after bowling them out for a record-low 86 in Ahmedabad. Kagiso Rabada, Mohammed Siraj and Jason Holder starred with the ball after Sai Sudharsan and Washington Sundar's half-centuries helped GT recover from an early collapse to post 168.

Florentino Perez alleges campaign against him at Real Madrid, calls elections Florentino Perez called early Real Madrid elections and ruled out resigning during a heated press conference. His attack on media criticism and silence on the manager's future deepened uncertainty around the club.

Andy Murray to return to coaching after failed Djokovic stint Andy Murray will join Jack Draper's team for the grass-court season after his split with Novak Djokovic. The move gives Draper experienced support for his return from injury ahead of Queen's and Wimbledon.

Ukraine's Elina Svitolina slams IOC over relaxation stance on Belarus athletes Elina Svitolina slammed the IOC for relaxing restrictions on Belarusian athletes, calling the move "sad and painful" while the war in Ukraine continues. The decision could allow Belarus athletes to compete under their national flag again.

Was offered money to target Virat Kohli: German influencer makes explosive claim IPL 2026: Virat Kohli's viral Instagram controversy has taken another twist after German influencer LizLaz claimed she was allegedly offered money to publicly target the RCB star. The influencer said she refused to make false allegations against Kohli despite being approached.

Mohammad Rizwan faces brutal trolling before bizarre dismissal in Mirpur Test: WatchBAN vs PAK, 1st Test: Mohammad Rizwan was brutally trolled by Litton Das, after which Nahid Rana dismissed him. Bangladesh sealed a historic 104-run victory in Mirpur to take a 1-0 lead and register their first-ever home Test win over Pakistan.

Man City still in Premier League title race: Guardiola unfazed by Arsenal winManchester City manager Pep Guardiola said Arsenal's late win over West Ham United on Sunday had not added any extra pressure on his side as the Premier League title race heads into its decisive phase.

Hansi Flick agrees Barcelona contract extension until 2028 after La Liga gloryHansi Flick confirmed on Tuesday that he will extend his stay at FC Barcelona until 2028 after leading the Catalan giants to their 29th La Liga title and another dominant domestic campaign.

Virat Kohli weakness figured out? KKR coach wary despite RCB star's lean runIPL 2026: Shane Watson said KKR will still prepare closely for Virat Kohli ahead of the Raipur clash with RCB. His back-to-back ducks have not reduced the threat he poses as Bengaluru push for a top-two finish.

GT vs SRH Highlights: Gujarat hammer Hyderabad by 82 runs to strengthen play-off gripGT (Gujarat) vs SRH (Hyderabad) Highlights, IPL 2026: Gujarat Titans hammered Sunrisers Hyderabad by 82 runs at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad to take a step closer to the playoffs.

Kolkata Knight Riders sweat over Varun Chakravarthy fitness ahead of RCB clashShane Watson said Varun Chakravarthy is still being monitored before KKR's must-win game against RCB. The spinner's fitness matters to a late playoff push built on his sharp mid-season turnaround.

Sat-Chi put social media storm behind, begin Thailand Open on a winning noteThailand Open Super 500: Top seeds Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty beat Indonesia's Muh Putra Erwiansyah and Bagas Maulana in three games in a tense first-round match on Tuesday, May 12.

FIFA World Cup 2026 telecast in doubt, Delhi HC seeks Doordarshan responseThe Delhi High Court has asked the Centre and Prasar Bharati to respond to a plea on broadcasting the FIFA World Cup 2026 in India. The case brings renewed focus on public access as the tournament nears without a confirmed Indian broadcaster.

The perfect trigger: How Salman Agha fuelled Bangladesh's historic Test win vs PakistanBAN vs PAK, 1st Test: On Monday, Salman Agha had challenged Bangladesh to set Pakistan a target of 260 in 70 overs. On Tuesday, Pakistan slumped to a 104-run defeat as the Tigers roared to a 1-0 series lead in Mirpur.

Cristiano Ronaldo's Al Nassr takes on Benzema's Al Hilal for Saudi league titleCristiano Ronaldo's Al Nassr host Karim Benzema's Al Hilal in Riyadh with the Saudi Pro League title on the line. Victory would end Al Nassr's seven-year wait and deliver Ronaldo his first league crown there.

Pakistan suffer humiliating first-ever Test defeat in BangladeshBangladesh created history in Dhaka on Tuesday, beating Pakistan at home for the first time with a 104-run win in the opening Test at the Shere Bangla National Stadium. The victory was also Bangladesh's third straight Test win over Pakistan.

MS Dhoni to play in Europe? Abhishek Bachchan reveals his big ETPL wishAbhishek Bachchan said he would love to see MS Dhoni play in the European T20 Premier League. His wish also exposed the BCCI rule that keeps contracted Indian players out of overseas leagues.

Virat Kohli jokes about twin ducks in hilarious dressing room spech: VideoVirat Kohli laughed off his recent batting slump with a cheeky dressing room joke after RCB's win over Mumbai Indians, showing little concern as Bengaluru push for a top-two IPL finish.

Dravid spends crores on a cricket team, but won't even attend practice. Here's whyRahul Dravid has been unveiled as Dublin Guardians owner in the European T20 Premier League. The move completes the six-team league structure ahead of the tournament's 2026 launch.

Shabnim reverses retirement, returns to South Africa Women's T20 World Cup squadSouth Africa have received a massive boost ahead of the ICC Women's T20 World Cup 2026 after veteran fast bowler Shabnim Ismail reversed her international retirement to return to the Proteas squad for the marquee tournament in England and Wales.

Sakshee Malikkh rallies behind Vinesh Phogat: Don't block a mother's right to competeOlympic medalist Sakshee Malikkh hit out at the WFI for stalling Vinesh Phogat's historic return to wrestling. Citing global support for female athletes, she urged the government to remove bureaucratic barriers against the new mother.

Wrestler's protest cost athletes international exposure: Deepak PuniaDeepak Punia said the disruption after the wrestlers' protest reduced overseas competition for Indian wrestlers. He said the fallout affected preparation, selection opportunities and long-term progress.

Ochoa's last World Cup mission? Mexican great targets Messi, Ronaldo milestoneVeteran Mexico goalkeeper Guillermo Ochoa is on the verge of creating football history as the 40-year-old closes in on a sixth FIFA World Cup appearance in 2026, a rare feat achieved only by Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo.

Meet Rishabh Yadav: The boy who wants to give Indian archery its greatest dayRishabh Yadav has set his sights on LA 2028 after a breakout 2025 in compound archery. His rise, and his world-record pairing with Jyothi Surekha Vennam, has strengthened India's hope of an overdue Olympic medal.

Rahul Dravid backs bowler-friendly pitches to restore balance in T20sFormer India coach Rahul Dravid said T20 cricket needs more challenging pitches to give bowlers a fairer chance, warning that the format risks becoming too heavily skewed towards batters because of the dramatic evolution in modern-day hitting.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
